descriptions: Level number is different
Level number and coin count differ from reference
Level and progress node values differ because of different game state/levels shown.
Game board is integrated differently
Game board is not tilted/rotated as in reference; shown flat and larger, overlapping title banner
The central game board in our version is vertically straight, whereas the reference shows it rotated/tilted at an angle.
Additional UI elements at top
Our version displays device-specific system status bar elements at the top.
Game board has different arrangement of marbles
Board has fewer marbles/holes and different grid layout, appears to be a different game state (5x5 vs 4x4-ish arrangement mismatch)
The game board state (positions of marbles, holes, and pucks/flippers) is completely different, indicating a mismatch in game state or level layout.
Coin count differs
Coin count differs
The coin/point balance in the bottom-left corner does not match.
Game board grid size is different
Hearts and gear icon boxes appear slightly smaller with thicker white outline in ours
Status bar elements added at top
iOS status bar (time, signal, battery) is visible in our screen but not in the reference design.
Plunger colors differ from reference layout
The style and gradient of UI containers (like the hearts container, settings button, and bottom-left coin button) are flatter with an extra outer white border in our version.
Status bar visible in ours but not reference
The background bubble patterns are different in size and opacity.
Orange banner header with decorative elements is missing
Orange banner header with 'SETTINGS' title and close (X) button is missing entirely
The blue close card button 'X' in the top right corner is completely missing in our version.
Title styling differs
Title styling differs from reference's bold game-style font
The 'SETTINGS' title at the top lacks the stylized orange ribbon background, the chunky white 3D letter styling, and uses a completely different font and color.
Panel background color differs
Overall card and panel color scheme differs significantly
The green 'CLOSE' button styling has lost its glossy, high-contrast gradient, inner shadows, and white borders.
Reset progress text formatting
'Reset Progress' text casing and styling differs
Background texture differs
The entire style and theme of the dialog box has changed from a glossy cartoon-like blue and orange ribbon style to a flat, beige cream style.
Level 4 text missing from banner
Coin counter badge showing total currency (e.g. '75') is missing from top right
Active level header 'LEVEL 4' is missing above the 'COMPLETED' banner, and the dark wood paneling background graphic behind the card is missing.
Reward amount missing plus sign
Reward value formatting differs
The label 'REWARD' is missing above the reward coins display inside the card.
Next button positioned differently
Overall composition is more compressed vertically with card taking up most of the screen, differing from reference's spacing and wood-panel background behind card
The main 'Next' action button is placed inside the card dialog in our version, whereas the reference has it placed outside the card near the bottom of the screen.
Status bar elements present
Extra 'Replay' text button added below Next button, not present in reference
A 'Replay' text link and an stray coin graphic in the bottom-left corner are visible in our version but not in the reference.
NEXT button text styling different
'NEXT' button text style differs - uppercase font weight and button shape less rounded/skewed compared to reference's playful stylized 'Next' button
The font style on the 'NEXT' button does not match the clean, cartoonish sans-serif typeface in the reference.
Level indicator missing
Sad emoji face illustration is missing
Missing sad face emoji illustration inside the card.
Different main message text
Message text differs from reference
The text description and headers do not match the reference.
Different button layout
Card vertical position differs; reference card starts higher and fills more of the screen
The button structure and layout inside the popup are completely different.
Extra 'Quit' option added
Status bar elements are visible in our version.
Button style/typography for Retry differs significantly
The font for the secondary action ('Retry') does not match the game's bold cartoon style.
Reference has decorative wood-paneled background behind card; ours lacks it
The dark wood board background behind the popup card is missing.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 45% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
